name: Warm Potato Salad with Bacon and Mustard-Beer Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup finely chopped red onions, rinsed in ice water
1/3 Cup chopped fresh herbs such as parsley, chive
Sieved hard boiled eggs, if desired
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon until crisp and drain on paper towels.
2. Chop the bacon coarsely and reserve it.
3. Reserve 1 tablespoon of rendered bacon fat for vinaigrette if desired.
4. Cook the potatoes in lightly salted water until tender but not mushy.
5. Drain, cool slightly, and slice unpeeled into thick rounds.
6. Gently mix the sliced potatoes with the reserved bacon, onions, herbs, and vinaigrette.
7. Correct seasoning and serve warm or at room temperature.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings
